textByHashes.cd42147cc7b85e428d72f546ad1d26e64fe12ee0: We're looking for Zanaris...GAH! I mean we're not here for any particular reason at all.
textByHashes.2989053477e4354b141bfdb11f796ac4b6bb2ec6: [laugh][laugh][laugh]! Zanaris isn't a person! It's a magical hidden city filled with treasures and rich.. uh, nothing. It's nothing.
textByHashes.ee23742d991b4bb6c85d9c5c4a2951c0ba4060c2: Well, we don't want to tell anyone else about that, because we don't want anyone else sharing in all that glory and treasure.
textByHashes.6a1819b50d4807402a3cc75a8517ecf93d64d7dc: Of course we know! We just haven't found which tree the stupid leprechaun's hiding in yet!
textByHashes.968d6e5fc5723ee8690089edcb9277966ae0930c: GAH! I didn't mean to tell you that! Look, just forget I said anything okay?
textByHashes.63c77a9f83b2194e1ad4e52d12d26eabe5507b68: Ye.. uh, no. No, not at all. And even if he did - which he doesn't - he DEFINITELY ISN'T hiding in some tree around here. Nope, definitely not. Honestly.
textByHashes.a14c7be3c4830d686ec7aff4c9bc7743bb648d91: Help? What help? I didn't help! Please don't say I did, I'll get in trouble!
textByHashes.3ca3f5b5159943a72820e1263dd41622d7e72e7e: When we've found Zanaris you'll... GAH! I mean, we're not here for any particular reason at all.
textByHashes.a20327fc9adce16cc01ab48a2c14828442119324: I don't think we want other people competing with us to find it. Forget I said anything.
textByHashes.11fefd5fecac317a6a10f5bff853e801cfa56dc3: Don't you know of the legends that tell of the magical city, hidden in the swam... Uh, no, you're right, we're wasting our time here.
textByHashes.9372aea3e37b9ccefe2e06ddcf3a251cfe9f7ef3: Well we're on an adventure right now. Mind you, this is OUR adventure and we don't want to share it - find your own!
textByHashes.92078d638ed3aaf56e8f7d049cea574475334e16: Hah! Adventurers of our calibre don't just hang around in forests for fun, whelp!
textByHashes.1f4e06ab76551241333ed7383c55d288c01c7b50: What? How did you know that? Uh... I mean, no, no you're very wrong. Very wrong, and not right at all, and I definitely didn't tell you about that at all.
textByHashes.7c9f1b0195de618bd72c2d833788aebd78c9a16d: We're still searching for Zanaris...GAH! I mean we're not doing anything here at all.
textByHashes.81807cd08f8d8c0ad52808e56c6850c1e8b0f48f: Oh please don't say that anymore! If the rest of my party knew I'd helped you they'd probably throw me out and make me walk home by myself!
textByHashes.4c3c00d99ab4c75df13d9a23041a6e5651129e1f: So anyway, what have you found out? Where is the fabled Zanaris? Is it all the legends say it is?
